segments.text: At the same time, I will be the God of all the families of Israel, and they shall be my people.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: The people which were left of the sword found grace in the wilderness; even Israel, when I went to cause him to rest.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: I have loved thee with an everlasting love: therefore with lovingkindness have I drawn thee.
segments.speaker: God

footnotes: with lovingkindness…: have I extended lovingkindness unto thee

segments.text: Again I will build thee, and thou shalt be built, O virgin of Israel: thou shalt again be adorned with thy tabrets, and shalt go forth in the dances of them that make merry.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Thou shalt yet plant vines upon the mountains of Samaria: the planters shall plant, and shall eat them as common things.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: There shall be a day, that the watchmen upon the mount Ephraim shall cry, Arise ye, and let us go up to Zion unto the LORD our God.
segments.speaker: Prophet

segments.text: Sing with gladness for Jacob, and shout among the chief of the nations: publish ye, praise ye, and say, O LORD, save thy people, the remnant of Israel.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Behold, I will bring them from the north country, and gather them from the coasts of the earth, and with them the blind and the lame, the woman with child and her that travaileth with child together: a great company shall return thither.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: They shall come with weeping, and with supplications will I lead them: I will cause them to walk by the rivers of waters in a straight way, wherein they shall not stumble: for I am a father to Israel, and Ephraim is my firstborn.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Hear the word of the LORD, O ye nations, and declare it in the isles afar off, and say, He that scattered Israel will gather him, and keep him, as a shepherd doth his flock.
segments.speaker: God

heading: Hear the Word of the LORD

segments.text: A voice was heard in Ramah, lamentation, and bitter weeping; Rahel weeping for her children refused to be comforted for her children, because they were not.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Thou hast chastised me, and I was chastised, as a bullock unaccustomed to the yoke: turn thou me, and I shall be turned; for thou art the LORD my God.
segments.speaker: Ephraim

segments.text: Behold, the days come, that I will make a new covenant with the house of Israel, and with the house of Judah:
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: But this shall be the covenant that I will make with the house of Israel; After those days, I will put my law in their inward parts, and write it in their hearts; and will be their God, and they shall be my people.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Which giveth the sun for a light by day, and the ordinances of the moon and of the stars for a light by night, which divideth the sea when the waves thereof roar; The LORD of hosts is his name:
segments.speaker: God
